name: Insyde Software Corp.
summary: Insyde Software Corp. provides system firmware and software engineering services for companies in the mobile, desktop, server, and embedded systems industries worldwide. It offers client, server, and Internet of Things (IoT)/embedded solutions; developer tools; Supervyse, a systems management software; BlinkBoot UEFI Boot Loader; and mobile applications. The company also provides engineering services in the areas of project planning, design, implementation and integration, acceptance and deployment, and maintenance and field updates; and UEFI training programs. It serves mobile computing, desktop, servers, and embedded/IoT markets. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
